Interface Problem<G>

Type Parameters:
G - genotype value type.
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBooleanFunctionProblem, AbstractGrammarBitStringProblem, AlmostDisjunctMatrixProblem, BooleanFunctionMultiObjectiveProblem, BooleanFunctionPermutationProblem, BooleanFunctionProblem, BooleanFunctionTreeProblem, Cec2014Problem, CocoBbobProblem, DisjunctMatrixProblem, DtlzProblem, GrammarCsvClassificationProblem, GrammarCsvRegressionProblem, GrammarMajorityProblem, GrammarNguyenRegressionProblem, GrammarXorProblem, KnapsackProblem, MaxSatProblem, MixedVariableToyProblem, NguyenSymbolicRegressionProblem, OneMaxProblem, RastriginProblem, ResolvableMatrixProblem, RosenbrockProblem, SmallTspProblem, SphereProblem, TsplibTspProblem, ZdtProblem
public interface Problem<G>
Optimization problem contract.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Fitness
    evaluate(G genotype)
    Evaluates one genotype and returns its fitness.
    default boolean
    feasible(G genotype)
    Returns true if the genotype satisfies hard constraints.
    String
    name()
    Problem identifier used for reporting and persistence.
    default int
    objectiveCount()
    Number of objectives; defaults to one objective.
    ObjectiveSense
    objectiveSense()
    Returns whether this problem is min or max.
    default List<String>
    violations(G genotype)
    Returns validation/constraint violations for diagnostics.

  • Method Details

    • name

      String name()
      Problem identifier used for reporting and persistence.

    • objectiveSense

      ObjectiveSense objectiveSense()
      Returns whether this problem is min or max.

    • evaluate

      Fitness evaluate(G genotype)
      Evaluates one genotype and returns its fitness.

    • feasible

      default boolean feasible(G genotype)
      Returns true if the genotype satisfies hard constraints.

    • violations

      default List<String> violations(G genotype)
      Returns validation/constraint violations for diagnostics.

    • objectiveCount

      default int objectiveCount()
      Number of objectives; defaults to one objective.
